name: arcade-gateway-hub
description: Your Arcade gateways — curated sets of apps and tools (Slack, Gmail, GitHub, Calendar, Notion, Linear, and more) over one connection.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the Arcade Gateway Hub (https://hub.arcadeagent.dev/mcp). Ask for what you want; the right tool from your active Arcade gateway runs, with one-time app sign-ins handled in the browser — no API keys. Includes Arcade_SelectGateway to view and switch gateways per app or account-wide. Requires Node.js (uses the pinned mcp-remote proxy to bridge Claude Desktop's stdio transport to the hosted server).

tools.name: Arcade_SelectTools
tools.description: Find the right tool for a task (scoped to your active gateway)

tools.name: Arcade_UseTool
tools.description: Run a tool found by Arcade_SelectTools

tools.name: Arcade_SelectGateway
tools.description: See your gateways or switch the active one (this app or everywhere)

tools.name: Arcade_Apps
tools.description: See or disconnect your connected apps

tools.name: Arcade_ManageToolAuthorization
tools.description: Fix an app connection — switch account, expired sign-in, permissions
